type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
THIS ELEMENT IS NEUTRALIZED AND RELEASED AS A NITRITE/NITRATE COMPOUND IN ì
THE TREATED EFFLUENT IRRIGATION STREAM.  THE ELEMENT BECOMES A VALUABLE ì
NUTRIENT TO THE FARM SOILS.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
TREATED EFFLUENT IS UTILIZED AS A NUTRIENT AND IRRIGATION SUPPLIMENT FOR ì
FARMING OPERATIONS - THIS PRACTICES REDUCES THE NEED FOR CHEMICAL ì
FERTILIZERS AND "FRESH" WATER IRRIGATION.
